C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\k2pdfopt.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\k2pdfopt.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\k2pdfopt.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe  -DUSE_CMAKE -DK2PDFOPT_KINDLEPDFVIEWER -Wall -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\k2pdfopt.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o k2pdfopt.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libk2pdfopt.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\k2pdfopt.dir\linkLibs.rsp
